About.heading: Our Story
About.whoWeAre: A youth-led organization founded by Banyamulenge students to empower the next generation.
About.missionDescription: Mulenge Scholars' Network Canada (MSNC) is a youth-led organization founded by Banyamulenge students who understand firsthand the challenges of navigating new education systems. The Banyamulenge are a resilient community from eastern DRC facing cycles of displacement. We empower youth across Canada through mentorship, academic guidance, leadership development, and fostering community belonging.
About.missionQuote: Bridging gaps through culturally-responsive mentorship and global opportunity centralization.
About.heritageDescription: MSNC was founded with deep understanding of Banyamulenge diaspora challenges. We celebrate cultural heritage while navigating Canadian landscape.
About.heritageQuote: Our heritage is our strength, our community is our future.

Hero.label: A Youth-Led Organization
Hero.title: Empowering Banyamulenge youth to succeed in their studies, careers, and communities
Hero.subtitle: Founded by Banyamulenge students, MSNC helps youth navigate new educational systems through mentorship, academic support, leadership, and a strong sense of belonging.

TheChallenge.heading: Navigating a New Educational System
TheChallenge.subheading: Many Banyamulenge families arrived in Canada after experiencing displacement and living in multiple countries, each with different educational systems. Transitioning to the Canadian system can be difficult not only for students, but also for their families.
TheChallenge.criticalAwarenessBody: Many families have lived in several countries, each with different educational systems, complicating the transition.
barriers: Lack of guidance on academic pathways
Financial pressures pushing towards short-term jobs
Families unfamiliar with the Canadian system

StrategicPillars.heading: Our Approach
StrategicPillars.subheading: We believe that with the right support, every student can succeed. Our programs are designed to bridge these gaps and provide youth with the tools they need to build a bright future.

GlobalImpact.heading: Empowering
GlobalImpact.visionStatement: We envision a future where Banyamulenge youth are confident in their abilities, succeed in their academic journeys, establish themselves in meaningful and sustainable careers, and become leaders who give back to their communities.

collaboration.description: We believe in the power of partnerships and teamwork to create greater impact.

metadata.title: Leadership & Executive Board | MSNC
metadata.description: Meet the architects of resilience. Our multidisciplinary leadership team bridges the gap between Mulenge potential and global opportunity.

header.label: Institutional
header.title: Leadership
header.description: The MSNC Executive Board is a multidisciplinary collective of scholars and advocates. We don't just lead an organization; we steward a generational promise of academic excellence and community resilience.

values.d: Connecting the Mulenge diaspora with top-tier international academic institutions.
Transparent stewardship of resources and trust across four strategic pillars.
A board actively involved in guiding individual scholar trajectories.
